name: Detectify
description: Monitor Detectify web application security scanner for vulnerability detection and DAST compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Detectify at https://detectify.com
2. Go to Team Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Detectify Team Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Detectify web security scans are configured and running

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Detectify team members with access to web security scan results
